h4: Audited Summer Internship Report for MBA Batch 9, DBM Batch 1, HHM Batch 1 (2023-2025)
h5: The Indian Institutes of Management have been the archetype of management schooling in India since their foundation after our independence in 1947

Career Development Cell is pleased to announce the successful completion of the Final Placements for the MBA 2022-24 batch. For the largest-ever batch size of 266 students, the institute saw record-breaking participation by 120 plus esteemed companies spanning across sectors and industries.
Indian Institute of Management Bodh Gaya
